name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: On W Jefferson Blvd in Dallas, TX, TitleMax Title Loans provides same-day title loans for local residents.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans operates from a standalone storefront at 4129 W Jefferson Blvd in Dallas, TX. This Dallas location serves the Jefferson Boulevard corridor and nearby residential neighborhoods. Open Monday–Friday 10 AM–7 PM and Saturday 10 AM–4 PM, the store is closed Sundays.

At this Dallas branch, you can apply for title loans using your vehicle as collateral for same-day cash funding. Phone the location at 972-707-5034 to discuss loan amounts, terms, and the application process, or visit in person during business hours.

Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and your vehicle title when you visit the W Jefferson Blvd location. TitleMax processes title loans quickly, with many applications approved and funded the same day. It's a straightforward option for Dallas residents needing rapid access to cash.
pros: Most credit types accepted — vehicle title supplements credit score evaluation
Borrowers keep driving their vehicle throughout the loan term
Offers both secured (title pledge) and unsecured (personal LOC) products at the same location
Bilingual staff available for Spanish-speaking customers
5.0-star average across 481+ Google reviews at the Memphis Summer Avenue location
Flex line of credit allows withdrawals over time rather than forcing a single lump-sum draw
cons: Interest rates and APRs are not disclosed on the website — 'competitive rates' is uninformative
Vehicle repossession is the consequence of default on title loans
Store is closed Sundays, limiting access for weekend emergencies
Online unsecured line of credit is only available in 11 states
Title loan requires a clear vehicle title — borrowers with liens on their car do not qualify
best_for: Car owners with poor or thin credit who need same-day emergency cash
Borrowers who have been denied by traditional lenders and own their vehicle outright
Tennessee residents who need a flexible line of credit rather than a fixed lump-sum loan
Spanish-speaking borrowers seeking bilingual in-person service
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for car-owning borrowers with damaged or limited credit who need emergency cash the same day and cannot qualify for personal loans or credit union alternatives. The primary caveat is cost transparency — APRs are not published, title loans as a category typically carry very high rates, and defaulting puts the borrower's vehicle at risk, making this a high-stakes product that should be a last resort rather than a first stop.
services: Secured flex line of credit using vehicle title
Unsecured personal line of credit (online, select states)
Online application for unsecured line of credit
Credit check with vehicle value as collateral offset
Vehicle value assessment for loan sizing
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at 4129 W Jefferson Blvd, Dallas, TX. Same-day title loans for quick cash funding.
